name: ariana-framework-v3-enterprise-preview
description: Ariana Framework v3 enterprise preview with v2 compiler completion, list operations, AST groundwork, and typed router.

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/core packages/compiler packages/router packages/vite-plugin examples/counter-app
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core packages/compiler packages/router packages/vite-plugin examples/counter-app --pretty
scripts.benchmark:micro: npm --prefix benchmarks/micro-update install && npm --prefix benchmarks/micro-update run bench
scripts.benchmark:list: npm --prefix benchmarks/list-update install && npm --prefix benchmarks/list-update run bench
scripts.benchmark:ops: npm --prefix benchmarks/list-operations install && npm --prefix benchmarks/list-operations run bench
scripts.benchmark:router: npm --prefix benchmarks/router install && npm --prefix benchmarks/router run bench
scripts.benchmark:ast: npm --prefix benchmarks/compiler-ast install && npm --prefix benchmarks/compiler-ast run bench
